title: Canoe Boats
body:
Boats become Canoes!

This pack remodels and retextures Minecraft's basic boats into Canoes.

OptiFine or Mods ETF ETM Required
Versions 1.20.1+

Support for:

  • Boats
  • Chest Boats
  • Bamboo Rafts
  • Bamboo Chest Rafts

Tutorial

Due to OptiFine having inconsistent updates and features, its recommended to use mods: EMF & ETF instead

If using OptiFine, make sure to enable these settings for complete features:

Video Settings -> Quality -> Custom Entity Models: ON
Random Entities -> ON
Emissive Textures -> ON
In order to prevent texture issues, Canoe Boats should be at the TOP of your Resource Pack list.
